title: Aviation Inspectors
description: Inspect aircraft, maintenance procedures, air navigational aids, air traffic controls, and communications equipment to ensure conformance with Federal safety regulations.

tasks.text: Inspect work of aircraft mechanics performing maintenance, modification, or repair and overhaul of aircraft and aircraft mechanical systems to ensure adherence to standards and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine maintenance records and flight logs to determine if service and maintenance checks and overhauls were performed at prescribed intervals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect new, repaired, or modified aircraft to identify damage or defects and to assess airworthiness and conformance to standards, using checklists, hand tools, and test instruments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Approve or deny issuance of certificates of airworthiness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain detailed repair, inspection, investigation, and certification records and reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Examine landing gear, tires, and exteriors of fuselage, wings, and engines for evidence of damage or corrosion and the need for repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend replacement, repair, or modification of aircraft equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start aircraft and observe gauges, meters, and other instruments to detect evidence of malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine aircraft access plates and doors for security.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend changes in rules, policies, standards, and regulations, based on knowledge of operating conditions, aircraft improvements, and other factors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate air accidents and complaints to determine causes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze training programs and conduct oral and written examinations to ensure the competency of persons operating, installing, and repairing aircraft equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct flight test programs to test equipment, instruments, and systems under a variety of conditions, using both manual and automatic controls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
